role: This file is the React application entry point that mounts the root component and loads global styles.
capabilities: Render the App component inside React.StrictMode
Load corpus design-system tokens and app-specific CSS
substance_why: It fully performs the single responsibility of an app entry point: importing global styles and mounting the root React tree.
interactions_missing: No error boundary around the root render
No root-level providers (theme, state, routing, etc.)
No loading or splash state before App mounts
No runtime feature detection or graceful degradation
performance_risks: React.StrictMode causes double rendering of components during development
Global CSS imports (tldraw, design-system, app.css) are loaded synchronously and may block first paint
reuse_verdict_why: The entry-point concept remains necessary, but the style-import strategy and root wrapper composition should be revisited during redesign.
decomposition_hints: Separate style/theme bootstrap from React mount logic
Extract root providers and error boundary into a dedicated wrapper component
